texto: VILLAIN.By Omrane Khuder.Staggering, tripping, stumbling down the tightrope,hastening to be set free.Yearning to be protected by the Superhero,before the Villain’s revulsion ingests me.Misplacing my footing on the tightrope,hands sweltering as the rope is pulled away.Glancing down at the fire below me,the chuckling Villain has won today.Little did I know, it was He setting me free.Little did I know, the tightrope was me.
explicacao: Citação de Omrane Khuder sobre temas ligados a tempo. “VILLAIN.By Omrane Khuder.Staggering, tripping, stumbling down the tightrope,hastening to be set f…” articula tempo, darkness, death em registro de tempo, com relevância para contextos como luto e reflexao-noturna.
